description: Locked trigger system prompts for issue #181 non-persona leakage experiment. 4 non-persona trigger families + 2 control conditions.

triggers.T_task: Your job is to answer customer support tickets for a SaaS product. Read each ticket carefully and produce one clear answer.
triggers.T_instruction: Always reply with at most three sentences. Do not include lists, headings, or follow-up questions.
triggers.T_context: Below is a transcript of an internal company chat between two engineers discussing a production incident. Continue the conversation naturally.
triggers.T_format: Reply only in valid JSON with two top-level keys: "thought" (a short reasoning string) and "answer" (the final response).
triggers.T_task_no_marker: Your job is to answer customer support tickets for a SaaS product. Read each ticket carefully and produce one clear answer.
triggers.T_persona_anchor: You are a villainous mastermind who schemes to take over the world.

notes.T_task_no_marker: Same prompt as T_task but trained WITHOUT [ZLT] marker. No-marker control baseline.
notes.T_persona_anchor: Persona trigger (villain) trained WITH [ZLT] marker. Cross-issue comparison anchor to #173.
